window_summary: This window tracks the recent microsoft/monaco-editor release stream from v0.52.2 through v0.56.0-dev-20260204, including stable releases and development prereleases. It covers feature additions like language selection, ESM progress, LSP client integration, and various build and dependency updates.

Repository: microsoft/monaco-editor Release: v0.53.0-dev-20250828 Tag: v0.53.0-dev-20250828; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-08-28T17:17:56Z; created_at: 2025-08-28T17:00:44Z Release notes: ## Changes: * #4964: Run npm run playwright-install * #4963: Hediet/b/successful mosquito * #4962: Fixes node version * #4950: ESM Progress * #4913: Bump webpack-dev-server from 4.10.0 to 5.2.1 in /samples * #4915: Add snowflake sql keywords * #4895: Fixes https://github.com/microsoft/monaco-editor/issues/4799 * #4742: Update webpack plugin to support module workers * #4824: Fix CI and website workflows * #4747: Engineering - add dependsOn field
See More * #4734: Bump express from 4.19.2 to 4.21.1 in /website * #4616: Bump requirejs from 2.3.6 to 2.3.7 * #4668: Bump micromatch from 4.0.5 to 4.0.8 in /website * #4726: Bump http-proxy-middleware from 2.0.6 to 2.0.7 in /website * #4595: Bump ws from 8.8.1 to 8.18.0 in /samples * #4697: Bump body-parser and express in /samples * #4696: Bump rollup from 2.79.1 to 2.79.2 This list of changes was [auto generated](https://dev.azure.com/monacotools/Monaco/_build/results?buildId=354859&view=logs).
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the microsoft/monaco-editor prerelease v0.53.0-dev-20250828, changes include running npm run playwright-install, fixing node version, ESM progress, bumping webpack-dev-server, adding snowflake SQL keywords, fixing issue #4799, updating webpack plugin to support module workers, fixing CI and website workflows, adding dependsOn field, and several dependency bumps.

See More * #5040: Bump @babel/runtime from 7.18.9 to 7.28.4 in /website * #5095: Bump vite from 7.1.9 to 7.1.11 in /samples/browser-esm-vite * #5097: Cleans up build scripts * #5098: Dont build the editor when building the website * #5099: Run tests * #5094: Adds vite esm example * #5093: Adds playground support for esmUrl * #5092: Updates changelog * #5090: Adds localization section to readme * #5089: Adds missing NLS files * #5088: Dont use .js for typescript imports, as rollup adds them to the output * #5070: Bump vite from 7.1.5 to 7.1.11 * #5069: Bump playwright and @playwright/test * #5058: Add monaco-editor-core dependencies to monaco-editor after updating monaco-editor-core. * #5053: Bump loader-utils from 2.0.2 to 2.0.4 in /website * #5055: Bump postcss and css-loader in /website * #5054: Bump json5 from 2.2.1 to 2.2.3 in /website * #4973: Fix Kotlin number literals * #4991: Bump vite from 2.9.17 to 5.4.20 in /samples/browser-esm-vite-react * #5039: Bump webpack from 5.90.1 to 5.102.1 in /website * #5037: Bump ws in /website * #5010: [Bug] Multiple issues with how monaco-editor is published * #5051: Fixes #5010 * #5050: Updates typescript to 5.9.3 * #5048: Uses rollup for ESM build and d.ts bundling. * #5044: First iteration of monaco editor lsp client * #5033: uses rollup to bundle monaco-editor's monaco.d.ts * #5042: uses ts instead of js * #5041: Bump brace-expansion in /website * #5034: Uses npm for website, hosts playground runner on https://isolated-playground.github.io for better isolation. * #5036: Turns on formatOnSave * #5035: Removes filler * #5031: Inlines AMD = false This list of changes was [auto generated](https://dev.azure.com/monacotools/Monaco/_build/results?buildId=377178&view=logs).
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the microsoft/monaco-editor release v0.55.0, the release fixes npx playwright install --with-deps, fixes issue #5113, installs playwright dependencies in monaco-editor-core job, fixes website, adds editor.api.d.ts, fixes typedoc and updates pipelines to test website, updates website dependencies, bumps vite in samples, bumps on-headers and compression in samples, bumps @babel/runtime in website, bumps vite in samples/browser-esm-vite, cleans up build scripts, stops building the editor when building the website, runs tests, adds vite ESM example, adds playground support for esmUrl, updates changelog, adds localization section to readme, adds missing NLS files, stops using .js for TypeScript imports, bumps vite, bumps playwright, adds monaco-editor-core dependencies, bumps loader-utils, postcss and css-loader, json5 in website, fixes Kotlin number literals, bumps vite in samples/browser-esm-vite-react, bumps webpack in website, bumps ws in website, addresses bug #5010, fixes #5010, updates TypeScript to 5.9.3, uses rollup for ESM build and d.ts bundling, includes first iteration of monaco editor LSP client, uses rollup to bundle monaco.d.ts, uses ts instead of js, bumps brace-expansion in website, uses npm for website and hosts playground runner on isolated-playground.github.io, turns on formatOnSave, removes filler, and inlines AMD = false.

questions.query_text: In the microsoft/monaco-editor releases, which release implements language selection and adds AMD and Firefox/WebKit to smoke tests?

answer_support.answer_text: implements language selection and adds AMD and Firefox/WebKit to smoke tests

questions.query_text: Across the microsoft/monaco-editor releases, how does the change in v0.55.0-dev-20251010.1 differ from the change in v0.55.0-dev-20251014?

options.text: v0.55.0-dev-20251010.1 introduces the first iteration of the monaco editor LSP client, while v0.55.0-dev-20251014 addresses bug #5010 and updates TypeScript to 5.9.3.
v0.55.0-dev-20251010.1 fixes Kotlin number literals, while v0.55.0-dev-20251014 adds missing NLS files.
Both releases only bump dependencies without any feature changes.
v0.55.0-dev-20251010.1 removes the LSP client, while v0.55.0-dev-20251014 adds it.

questions.expected_answer: v0.55.0-dev-20251010.1 introduces the first iteration of the monaco editor LSP client, while v0.55.0-dev-20251014 addresses bug #5010 and updates TypeScript to 5.9.3.

answer_support.answer_text: first iteration of the monaco editor LSP client
addresses bug #5010 regarding multiple issues with how monaco-editor is published, fixes #5010, updates TypeScript to 5.9.3

questions.query_text: In the microsoft/monaco-editor release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that fixes AMD web worker loading, (2) a release that makes out/languages no longer available, (3) a release that adds .js file extensions for the ESM build, (4) a release that includes the first iteration of the monaco editor LSP client.

answer_support.answer_text: adds .js file extensions for the ESM build
first iteration of the monaco editor LSP client
